title: pisophaca proxima
side_effects: Pisophaca proxima can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive issues. Ingesting the plant's leaves or stems may cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to the presence of toxic compounds. Overuse of the plant's essential oil can lead to headaches, dizziness, and respiratory problems. In severe cases, improper use of Pisophaca proxima can cause anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction.
